exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.content_summary: Audited financial statements for FY 2022, 2023, 2024. Auditor: CliftonLarsonAllen LLP, clean opinion dated March 24, 2025. Includes balance sheets, income statements, equity changes, cash flows, and 9 notes. Franchisor is QSSS (S-corp) — no federal income tax.

exhibits.name: Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.content_summary: Agents for 14 states: CA, NY, HI, ND, IL, RI, IN, SD, MD, VA, MI, WA, MN, WI. All other states: serve at corporate address.

exhibits.name: Brand Standards and Operations Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.content_summary: Table of contents for 164-page Brand Standards Manual. Chapters cover: Getting Your Business Started, Employee Management, and additional operational chapters. Confidential/proprietary — full content not disclosed.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.content_summary: Full franchise agreement text (~30 pages). Includes definitions (Gross Sales, Core Services, RMM, PSA, etc.), fee structure, territory provisions, operating requirements, termination, transfer, non-compete, dispute resolution, personal guaranty. Key provisions summarized in Item 17 table.

exhibits.name: Multi-State Addendum to Disclosure Document and Franchise Agreement
exhibits.content_summary: State-specific overrides for 14 registration states: CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI. Covers non-compete enforceability (CA), franchise relationship laws, dispute resolution venue, choice of law, liquidated damages, jury trial waiver deletions, and franchise registration compliance requirements.

exhibits.name: Amendment to Franchise Agreement for Existing and New Multiple
exhibits.content_summary: Amendment for franchisees operating multiple territories. Includes territory consolidation, coterminous terms, operating requirements, release provisions.

exhibits.name: Conversion Addendum
exhibits.content_summary: Addendum for converting independent IT businesses to TeamLogic IT franchise. CFF waived on average existing Gross Sales for first 12 months. Must convert/migrate managed services clients within 90 days. Fee: $49,500.

exhibits.name: Transfer Release Agreement
exhibits.content_summary: Mutual release agreement between franchisor and selling franchisee upon transfer. Covers consent to transfer, mutual release of claims (known and unknown), CA Civil Code 1542 waiver, post-termination obligations survive.

exhibits.name: State Franchise Administrators
exhibits.content_summary: Contact information for franchise administrators in 14 registration states.

exhibits.name: SBA Addendum
exhibits.content_summary: SBA loan addendum required if franchisee obtains SBA-assisted financing.

exhibits.name: Item 23 Receipt
exhibits.content_summary: Two copies of detachable acknowledgement receipt. Lists franchise sellers (21 named individuals) and franchise broker companies (7 broker firms: Franchoice, Franchise Consulting Company, Entrepreneur Option, Plan B and C, IFPG, American Business Alliance, Allwright Franchise Consulting).
